title: GreenScreen
description: GreenScreen adds new craftable solid coloured blocks.
body:
# GreenScreen (Quilt)  
This mod adds new craftable solid coloured blocks.  
These blocks use the same rendering system as the end gateway portal blocks to prevent shadows and to make sure the block is always the same colour.  
![A player standing on a Green Screen Block structure.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PnjnWiFL/images/37c8dd4361c9200048dee745d05e17e1d8a72977.png)  
![A player standing on a Glow Cyan Screen Block structure.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PnjnWiFL/images/6860e391b5ba2cbf567b0c7ab6e0c1940f9b5d1c.png)  

## Recipes  
**You can craft the Green Screen Block with 4 lime dye.**  
![4 lime dye = 1 Green Screen Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PnjnWiFL/images/b4afcef1771e67a3684af708b448e94491008b11.png)  
**You can craft the Cyan Screen Block with 4 cyan dye.**  
**You can also craft the Green Screen Block back into 4 lime dye.**  
![1 Green Screen Block = 4 lime dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PnjnWiFL/images/0001378fb80b00a5556ad6747e5033bdf1268b63.png)  
**You can also craft the Cyan Screen Block back into 4 cyan dye.**  
**You can craft the Glow Green Screen Block with a Green Screen Block and a Glow Ink Sac.**    
**You can craft the Glow Cyan Screen Block with a Cyan Screen Block and a Glow Ink Sac.**    

Glow Screen Block variants cannot be uncrafted.
